title: NEBNext Ultra II Directional RNA Library Prep Kit for Illumina: cDNA End Prep
author: Opentrons

steps.title: This protocol performs the end prep...
steps.instruction: This protocol performs the end prep for cDNA in the NEBNext Ultra II Directional RNA Library Prep Kit. Reaction buffer and enzyme mix are added to samples before mixing. The sample plate is then moved to an off-deck thermocycler.

steps.title: Temperature module cools down to 4 C
steps.instruction: Temperature module cools down to 4 C

steps.title: 10 uL of reaction buffer and...
steps.instruction: 10 uL of reaction buffer and enzyme mix is added to each sample

steps.title: Samples with buffer and enzyme mix...
steps.instruction: Samples with buffer and enzyme mix added are mixed via pipetting
